zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst於1363年1月6日出生在英國素可米度爾斯特時，他的父親Sir John DeBohun I62歲，母親Baroness Cicely Filliol38歲。他於1399年與Anne Joan Halsham在英國素福爾可拉特萊斯登結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1433年1月25日在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特享年70歲，埋葬在英國素可易亞布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst于1363年1月6日出生在英国素可米度爾斯特时，他的父亲Sir John DeBohun I62岁，母亲Baroness Cicely Filliol38岁。他于1399年与Anne Joan Halsham在英国素福爾可拉特萊斯登结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1433年1月25日在英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特享年70岁，埋葬在英国素可易亞布恩。

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst was born on 6 January 1363, in Midhurst, Sussex, England, his father, Sir John DeBohun I, was 62 and his mother, Baroness Cicely Filliol, was 38. He married Anne Joan Halsham in 1399, in Rattlesden, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 25 January 1433, in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Easebourne, Sussex, England.

fr.Exeter Bradninch Precinct, Devon, Englan: Exeter Bradninch Precinct, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst est né le 6 janvier 1363, à Midhurst, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John DeBohun I, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Baroness Cicely Filliol, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Anne Joan Halsham en 1399, à Rattlesden, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 25 janvier 1433, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Easebourne, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.Exeter Bradninch Precinct, Devon, Englan: Exeter Bradninch Precinct, Devon, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst am 6. Januar 1363 in Midhurst, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John DeBohun I 62 und seine Mutter Baroness Cicely Filliol 38. Er hat 1399 in Rattlesden, Suffolk, England Anne Joan Halsham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Januar 1433 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Easebourne, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst è nato il il 6 gennaio 1363 nel Midhurst, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir John DeBohun I, aveva 62 anni e il suo madre, Baroness Cicely Filliol, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Anne Joan Halsham nel 1399, nel Rattlesden, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 25 gennaio 1433, nel Exeter, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Easebourne, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Bohun II,   of Midhurstが1363年1月6日にイギリススセックスミドハルストで生まれた時，父Sir John DeBohun Iは62歳，母Baroness Cicely Filliolは38歳であった。1399年にイギリススフォルクラットレスデンでAnne Joan Halshamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1433年1月25日にイギリスイギリスデボンエクセターで70歳で死去し，イギリススセックスエアセボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.Exeter Bradninch Precinct, Devon, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터 브라드닌치 프레신크트
ko.lifeSummary: John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst(이)가 1363년 1월 6일 영국 수세스 미드후르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John DeBohun I(은)는 62세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Cicely Filliol(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1399년 영국 수폴크 래틀레즈든에서 Anne Joan Halsham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1433년 1월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 이세보우른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst nasceu em 6 de janeiro de 1363, em Midhurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John DeBohun I, tinha 62 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Cicely Filliol, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Joan Halsham em 1399, em Rattlesden, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de janeiro de 1433, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Easebourne, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.Exeter Bradninch Precinct, Devon, Englan: эксетир браднинч пресинкт, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst родился 6 января 1363 г. в местности мидхурст, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John DeBohun I было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Baroness Cicely Filliol, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Joan Halsham в 1399 г. в местности раттлесден, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 25 января 1433 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности эеисебурн, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Bohun II,   of Midhurst nació el 6 de enero de 1363, en Midhurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John DeBohun I, tenía 62 años y su mamá, Baroness Cicely Filliol, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Anne Joan Halsham en 1399, en Rattlesden, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 25 de enero de 1433, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Easebourne, Sussex, Inglaterra.
